result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aap system ki overall status pooch rahe ho. Koi tension nahi, sab kuch smooth chal raha hai!

Maine abhi `get_agents` tool use karke check kiya hai, aur status yeh hai:

*   🟢 **DM_Monitor_Pro**: Yeh agent **running** hai. Yeh continuously Instagram DMs monitor kar raha hai, tone analyze kar raha hai, aur reply suggestions de raha hai. Iska kaam chal raha hai.
*   🟢 **Jenny (Main)**: Main bhi **running** hoon, aur main hi OpenClaw ka central intelligence hoon, jo sabko coordinate kar rahi hoon.

Overall, system stable hai, aur saare core agents apne assigned tasks par kaam kar rahe hain. Koi major issue ya pending alert nahi hai.

Aapko kisi specific area (jaise pending tasks ya connected channels) ka update chahiye toh batao, main uske liye specific tool use karungi!
